sections.description: WordPress-native bookings CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8.39: Store commission in CRM room/night rows, show commission on Bookings list, and bump test version.
  • 1.8.8.38: Show commission preview in booking forms and fix Settings tab routing/titles.
  • 1.8.8.37: Add configurable Booking.com auto-commission, bump version for testing, and keep manual commission as override.
  • 1.8.8.36: Support room colors in hex/RGB, shrink month tabs/rows, soften vertical lines, add booking total previews, preserve manual room-rate overrides, make calendar tarif prefer nightly subtotal, add Bookings totals row, and make Invoice Ninja use CRM pricing first.
  • 1.8.8.35: Add booking-detail room-pricing preview/auto-fill and refine room pricing workflow.
  • 1.8.8.34: Add room-pricing auto-fill and live total preview on Add Booking page.
  • 1.8.8.33: Add room occupancy pricing admin UI and make calendar grid lines thinner/subtler.
  • 1.8.8.32: Add pricing discount fields to booking forms and remove calendar horizontal lines except above Room rate.
  • 1.8.8.31: Tune calendar colours closer to booking sheet with pastel room bands and light grid.
  • 1.8.8.30: Add occupancy pricing calculator and wire pricing fields into booking create/edit flows.
